category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (PFF mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to Brazil market (Certificado de Aprovacao CA by MTE/Fundacentro, NR-6, ABNT NBR 13698 PFF1/PFF2/PFF3).

title.en: China-to-Brazil PPE Respirator (PFF Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入巴西（PFF）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入巴西（PFF）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Brazilian requirements: the Certificado de Aprovacao (CA) issued by the Ministry of Labour (MTE) via Fundacentro, Norma Regulamentadora 6 (NR-6), ABNT NBR 13698 (PFF1/PFF2/PFF3) testing through an accredited OCP body, the in-country importer with CNPJ, and product marking and labelling in Portuguese.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与巴西要求对照，涵盖劳动部（MTE）经Fundacentro签发的认可证书（CA）、第6号监管规范（NR-6）、ABNT NBR 13698（PFF1/PFF2/PFF3）经认可OCP机构的检测、持CNPJ的在地进口商，以及葡萄牙语的产品标识与标签。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與巴西要求對照，涵蓋勞動部（MTE）經Fundacentro簽發的認可證書（CA）、第6號監管規範（NR-6）、ABNT NBR 13698（PFF1/PFF2/PFF3）經認可OCP機構的檢測、持CNPJ的在地進口商，以及葡萄牙語的產品標識與標籤。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Brazilian law, ABNT NBR standards, accredited OCP body scope, MTE/Fundacentro Certificado de Aprovacao procedure, and market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行巴西法律、ABNT NBR标准、认可OCP机构范围、MTE/Fundacentro认可证书（CA）程序及市场监督实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行巴西法律、ABNT NBR標準、認可OCP機構範圍、MTE/Fundacentro認可證書（CA）程序及市場監督實踐。

answer_first.en: Filtering facepiece respirators (PFF1/PFF2/PFF3) sold in Brazil as occupational PPE require a Certificado de Aprovacao (CA) issued by the Ministry of Labour (MTE) through Fundacentro, under Norma Regulamentadora 6 (NR-6). Performance is tested to ABNT NBR 13698 by an accredited OCP (Organismo de Certificacao de Produtos) body, and an in-country importer holding a CNPJ must hold or be named on the CA. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not satisfy ABNT NBR 13698 and cannot be used directly to obtain a CA number.
answer_first.zh: 在巴西作为职业PPE销售的过滤式半面罩呼吸器（PFF1/PFF2/PFF3）须取得劳动部（MTE）经Fundacentro依据第6号监管规范（NR-6）签发的认可证书（CA）。性能须由认可的OCP（产品认证机构）依据ABNT NBR 13698检测，且持CNPJ的在地进口商须持有CA或列名于CA之上。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不满足ABNT NBR 13698，不能直接用于取得CA编号。
answer_first.zht: 在巴西作為職業PPE銷售的過濾式半面罩呼吸器（PFF1/PFF2/PFF3）須取得勞動部（MTE）經Fundacentro依據第6號監管規範（NR-6）簽發的認可證書（CA）。性能須由認可的OCP（產品認證機構）依據ABNT NBR 13698檢測，且持CNPJ的在地進口商須持有CA或列名於CA之上。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不滿足ABNT NBR 13698，不能直接用於取得CA編號。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon change to NR-6, ABNT NBR 13698, or the MTE/Fundacentro Certificado de Aprovacao procedure
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator (gov.br / MTE / Fundacentro / INMETRO) and ABNT standards-body sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
